item.title: Senior Software Engineer at Google
item.description: Build scalable systems with React, TypeScript, and Go. $150,000 - $200,000. Location: San Francisco, CA. Requirements: 5+ years experience.

item.title: Data Scientist - Stripe
item.description: Analyze data and build ML models. Python, SQL, TensorFlow required. Remote position.

item.title: Frontend Developer | Netflix
item.description: Build the next generation of streaming UI. React, TypeScript. $120k-$160k.
